intended_use: Cleerly Labs is a web-based software application that is intended to be used by trained medical professionals as an interactive tool for viewing and analyzing cardiac computed tomography (CT) data for
intended_use_full: Cleerly Labs is a web-based software application that is intended to be used by trained medical professionals as an interactive tool for viewing and analyzing cardiac computed tomography (CT) data for determining the presence and extent of coronary plaques and stenosis in patients who underwent Coronary Computed Tomography Angiography (CCTA) for evaluation of CAD or suspected CAD.
target_condition: Coronary artery disease (CAD) or suspected CAD
ground_truth: Expert readers using multiple ground truthers for machine learning algorithm evaluation
other_metrics: Pearson Correlation Coefficients and Bland-Altman Agreement reported for multiple outputs: Lumen Volume (0.91 correlation, 96% agreement), Vessel Volume (0.93 correlation, 97% agreement), Total Plaque Volume (0.85 correlation, 95% agreement), Calcified Plaque Volume (0.94 correlation, 95% agreement), Non-Calcified Plaque Volume (0.74 correlation, 95% agreement), Low-Density-Non-Calcified Plaque Volume (0.53 correlation, 97% agreement)
